{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/62582584?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/TREXNEGRO", "id": 62582584, "login": "TREXNEGRO", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYyNTgyNTg0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53930", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:H/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary
The base-migration endpoint accepted a caller-supplied URL that the migration worker
dereferenced without enforcing protocol or destination, allowing scheme abuse
(`file:`, `ftp:`, etc.) and probing of internal HTTP destinations.

### Details
The `migrate` endpoint is restricted to the workspace owner role by ACL. The remaining
gaps were (a) protocol validation — the controller now parses `body.migrationUrl` as a
`URL` and rejects anything whose protocol is not `http:` or `https:` — and (b) private
destination filtering — the worker already runs through `useAgent(targetUrl)` from
`request-filtering-agent`, which blocks RFC 1918, loopback, and link-local at the
socket layer.

### Impact
With the workspace owner role, a malformed URL could be used to coerce the migration
worker into reading local files or talking to non-HTTP services; combined with the
HTTP-only filter, owner-supplied targets could not reach private ranges.

### Credit
This issue was reported by Devel Group Security Research Team through [@TREXNEGRO](https://github.com/TREXNEGRO).
It was independently reported by [@Lihfdgjr](https://github.com/Lihfdgjr) and [@bugbunny-research (https://github.com/bugbunny-research).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00288, "percentile": 0.20524}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h6vv-pcq8-7xm4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T14:08:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h6vv-pcq8-7xm4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h6vv-pcq8-7xm4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53930"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T14:08:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-h6vv-pcq8-7xm4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h6vv-pcq8-7xm4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-h6vv-pcq8-7xm4", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Server-Side Request Forgery via Base Migration URL", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T14:08:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h6vv-pcq8-7xm4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Server-Side Request Forgery via Base Migration URL
